name: LightCells
short_description: LightCells is an elegant and minimalist logic puzzle game that captivates players with its simplicity and depth.
detailed_description:
LightCells is an elegantly crafted minimalist logic puzzle game that provides players with a rich and engaging experience through its blend of simplicity and depth.

The game features clear and straightforward rules, generating a vast array of puzzles that encourage intriguing exploration. Players are invited to discover clues, experiment with various elements, and assemble the overall solution.

We warmly encourage you to join us on this enriching journey!

Key Features:

  • Over 140 Distinct Levels: Experience a diverse selection of puzzles that maintain a well-balanced difficulty curve, ensuring accessibility and enjoyment for players of all skill levels.

  • Uniquely Designed Solutions: Engage your logic and intuition with thoughtfully crafted puzzles that require careful consideration and creative problem-solving.

  • Zen-like Experience: Enjoy a tranquil, zen-like atmosphere that enhances your gameplay as you immerse yourself in each puzzle.

  • Minimalist Aesthetics: Appreciate soothing visuals complemented by gentle music and interactive elements, creating a serene and captivating environment for your gaming experience.

  • Infinite Mode: Explore endless possibilities with the Infinite Mode, designed to nurture your creativity and problem-solving potential.

  • Eye-Friendly Day/Night Mode: Take advantage of the option to switch between day and night modes, thoughtfully designed to ensure your comfort during extended play sessions.

We sincerely hope you find joy and fulfillment as you explore the challenges and discoveries that LightCells has to offer!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal
